---
title: "Nocturne  A1 99 b/m"
date: "2022-06-27T20:37:23"
#date-modified: "2022-06-15T20:37:23"
format: 
  html: default
image: "../img/les.jpg"
categories:
  - 2022
  - Les Paul
  - Hybrid picking
  - Study
---

Measures: A1\
Tempo: 99 bpm

{{< video https://youtu.be/gus5drOO19o >}}

```         
Gibson Les Paul
Pickup Position: Neck
Master Volume: 2.5
Master Tone: 3.5

Multi Effects Processor: Zoom G3Xn
Master Volume: 20 
Compressor: 6, Fast, 6, 80 ON
Slab Back Delay: 20, 50, 50, Quarter note

Joyo Tremolo
Intensity: 75%
Rate: 75%

Amplifier: Fender Blues Jr. III
Volume: 8.0
Fat: OFF
Treble: 6.5
Bass: 6.5
Middle: 6.5
Master: 3.0
Reverb: 5.0

Microphone: Blue Yeti 
Gain: 11 o'clock
Mode: Stereo, on floor, 1 m. away from amp
```

{{< video https://youtu.be/wqMAWrb8Jf0 >}}
